title: Best rear bike racks | Bin Diving
description: AI-dug recommendations for best rear bike racks. Compare options and find one that fits.

recommendations.product_name: Thule Pack 'n Pedal Tour Rack (Tour/Pack 'n Pedal Tour)
cons: May be overkill for light commuters

recommendations.product_name: Ibera PakRak Touring Carrier Plus (IB-RA4 / RA5)
pros: Very affordable with solid load capacity
cons: Some models not disc-brake compatible (check fit)
Build is lighter than heavy-duty steel touring racks

recommendations.product_name: Topeak Explorer MTX 2.0 / Explorer Tubular Rear Rack
pros: MTX QuickTrack compatibility with trunk bags/baskets
Aluminum build with ~25kg (55 lb) rated load
cons: May require longer mounting hardware on some frames
MTX accessories use proprietary mounting plate

https://www.thule.com/en-us/bike-packs-b.title: Thule Tour Rack | Thule | United States

https://www.cyclingabout.com/best-rear-r.title: The 10 Best Rear Racks for Bicycle Touring and Bikepacking - CYCLINGABOUT.com
https://www.cyclingabout.com/best-rear-r.description: The best rear racks will last a lifetime, so invest once, get it right - and you’ll never have to buy one again.

https://ibera.info/products/pakrak-touri.title: PakRak Touring Carrier Plus+ IB-RA4
https://ibera.info/products/pakrak-touri.description: Light, durable bike luggage/cargo carrier for non-disk frames. Multi-fit for 26"–29" bikes. Compatible with PakRak, G-2, & other panniers & trunk bags.

https://www.topeak.com/us/en/product/153.title: EXPLORER (NON-DISC) (W/ SPRING)
https://www.topeak.com/us/en/product/153.description: For 26", 27.5" (650B) & 700C Wheels A tough tubular aluminum rear rack perfect for classic loaded touring, commuting or just running errands. An integrated spring clip is convenient for securing lighter weight cargo. QuickTrack® compatible for use with any MTX TrunkBag and rear basket.
